## 2024-05-24 - [Avoid N+1 queries in loops performing deduplication]
**Learning:** Checking for the existence of records using an `await db.execute()` query inside a `for` loop (like deduplicating items generated by an LLM based on their hashes) leads to N+1 performance bottlenecks.
**Action:** Instead, pre-calculate the required identifiers (e.g., hashes) in an initial loop without awaiting, then make a single `.in_()` query to fetch all existing database records, store them in a fast lookup dictionary (like a hash map), and resolve duplicates against that dictionary.
